{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Emperor's face
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Emperor's face]] is printed on one side of gray bills used as currency.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
